ext_name.description: Extension name shown in the browser toolbar and store listing. Brand name — keep identical in all locales.

ext_description.message: Select text on any page to get an instant AI translation and a learner-friendly explanation.
ext_description.description: Extension description shown in the store listing and chrome://extensions.

modal_trigger_label.description: Accessible label + tooltip of the floating trigger icon that appears next to a text selection.

menu_translate_selection.description: Native right-click context menu item (contexts: ['selection']) that translates the currently selected text, same pipeline as the trigger icon.

modal_close_label.description: Accessible label for the × button that closes the translation modal.

modal_loading_text.description: Placeholder shown in the modal while a translation request is in flight.

modal_speak_source_label.description: Accessible label for the speaker button next to the source text in the translation modal (T-034 TTS).

modal_speak_target_label.description: Accessible label for the speaker button next to the translated text in the translation modal (T-034 TTS).

options_engine_section_heading.description: Section heading for the engine picker on the options page.

options_engine_auto_label.description: Option that lets the extension pick an engine automatically instead of a fixed choice.

options_engine_auto_hint.message: Uses the free trial engine by default, and the on-device engine when needed.
options_engine_auto_hint.description: Explains what Automatic engine selection does.

options_status_available.description: Status label shown next to an engine that can be used right now.

options_status_unavailable.description: Status label shown next to an engine that cannot be used right now.

options_keys_section_heading.description: Section heading for BYOK provider key fields.

options_gemini_key_label.description: Label for the Gemini API key input field.

options_key_input_placeholder.description: Placeholder text inside an API key input field.

options_save_button.description: Button that saves an API key field.

options_saved_confirmation.description: Brief confirmation shown after saving an API key.

options_target_lang_heading.description: Section heading for the target-language picker.

options_ui_lang_heading.description: Section heading explaining the extension UI language.

options_ui_lang_note.message: This extension's own interface follows your browser's language. To change it, adjust the language order in Chrome's settings.
options_ui_lang_note.description: Note explaining that UI language is not independently switchable in the MVP.

options_tts_section_heading.description: Section heading for the text-to-speech settings (T-034).

options_tts_section_note.message: Uses your browser's built-in voices — free, works offline, no account needed. Available voices depend on your operating system.
options_tts_section_note.description: Explanatory note under the Text-to-Speech section heading.

options_tts_autoplay_label.description: Checkbox label: when on, the translation is spoken as soon as it arrives, with no extra click needed.

options_tts_voice_default.description: Option in each per-language voice dropdown meaning "let the browser pick automatically", i.e. no stored preference.

options_tts_no_voices.message: No text-to-speech voices are installed for any of your target languages. This depends on your operating system, not this extension.
options_tts_no_voices.description: Shown instead of the voice picker list when speechSynthesis.getVoices() has no match for any TARGET_LANGUAGES entry.

options_tts_unsupported.message: Text-to-speech isn't supported in this browser.
options_tts_unsupported.description: Shown instead of the voice picker list when window.speechSynthesis doesn't exist at all.

engine_label_trial_gateway.description: Display name for the trial-gateway engine in the picker.

engine_label_on_device.description: Display name for the on-device engine in the picker.

engine_label_gemini.description: Display name for the Gemini BYOK engine in the picker.

engine_label_openai.description: Display name for the OpenAI BYOK engine in the picker.

options_openai_key_label.description: Label for the OpenAI API key input field.

popup_current_engine_label.description: Label before the active translation engine name in the popup.

popup_settings_button.description: Button in the popup that opens the options page.

popup_usage_hint.message: Select text on any page, then click the icon that appears to translate it.
popup_usage_hint.description: One-line usage hint shown in the popup for first-time users.

popup_no_engine.message: No translation engine is available yet.
popup_no_engine.description: Shown in the popup when no engine is currently usable.

popup_enabled_label.description: Label next to the popup's on/off toggle switch.

popup_disabled_hint.message: AI Translate is turned off. Turn it back on to translate selected text.
popup_disabled_hint.description: Shown in the popup when the user has switched the extension off.

engine_label_deepseek.description: Display name for the DeepSeek BYOK engine in the picker.

options_deepseek_key_label.description: Label for the DeepSeek API key input field.

error_generic.message: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error_generic.description: Fallback error text in the translation modal when no specific error message is available.

error_trial_quota_exhausted.message: Today's free quota is used up.
error_trial_quota_exhausted.description: Headline shown in the modal when the shared trial engine hits its daily limit.

error_upsell_settings_button.message: Set up your own API key
error_upsell_settings_button.description: Button in the trial-quota upsell that opens the options page.

error_upsell_dismiss_button.description: Button in the trial-quota upsell that just closes the modal.

error_upsell_on_device_button.description: Button in the trial-quota upsell offering an immediate free alternative when the on-device engine is available.

modal_explain_button.description: Button shown after a translation that requests a deeper word/phrase explanation.

modal_explain_loading.description: Placeholder shown while an Explain request is in flight.

modal_explain_disabled_hint.message: Explain needs an AI engine. Add your own API key in Settings to enable it.
modal_explain_disabled_hint.description: Tooltip on the disabled Explain button when the active engine (e.g. on-device) can't produce an explanation.

explain_section_definition.description: Section label in the Explain panel for the source + target language definitions.

explain_section_context.description: Section label in the Explain panel for the meaning as used in the selected text's surrounding context.

explain_section_examples.description: Section label in the Explain panel for CEFR-graded example sentences.

explain_section_collocations.description: Section label in the Explain panel for common word pairings.

explain_section_word_family.description: Section label in the Explain panel for related word forms (noun/verb/adjective forms, etc.).

explain_section_synonyms.description: Section label in the Explain panel for words with similar meaning.

explain_section_antonyms.description: Section label in the Explain panel for words with opposite meaning.

explain_section_memory_tip.description: Section label in the Explain panel for a mnemonic to help remember the word.

explain_expand_all.description: Toggle control in the Explain panel that opens every collapsible section at once.

explain_collapse_all.description: Same control as explain_expand_all, shown once every collapsible section is already open.
